chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-3992 of 2024 _____________________________________________________________ ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ______________________________________________________________ D/o. matter For hg. of CMA No.25830/2024 17.03.2025. Mr. Shahnawaz, advocate a/w petitioners Syed Hussain Shah, AAG a/w Raza Mian, Raza Mian DSP (Legal) and Syed Hyder, IO of the Case...... Petitioner No.1 (Mrs. Nawaz Khatoon) is present and submits that in this case order for determination of age of petitioner No.1 has been passed but she has apprehension to her life, if this process is conducted at Sukkur. She states that this process may be conducted here in Service Hospital at Karachi. IO present is directed to get medical examination of petitioner No.1 conducted at Service Hospital at Karachi. Raza Mian, DSP Legal on behalf IGP Sindh, present, is directed to facilitate the IO in the said process, so that, report should be come on record on the next date of hearing. Adjourned to 14.04.2025. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A.
